channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Chicago's New Museum to the Vain and Glorious
item.description: The Obama Presidential Center features impressive art, but questions arise about its museum's IRS compliance.

item.title: Attacks on Elon’s Wealth Are Attacks on America
item.description: The nation’s foundation is built upon the bedrock of the right to property and respect for individual labor and its rewards.

item.title: Just Say No
item.description: Believing that Iran will comply with any agreement it makes is foolish in the extreme.

item.title: Autism Centers Are Defrauding Medicaid to the Tune of Millions
item.description: Change is on the way for Americans disgusted by autism-therapy–related fraud.
